cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this question. The user is asking about three different jars of low-fat milk mentioned in the passage. The options are about which one has more or less fat or if they all have the same amount or cost. First, I need to check the passage details. The relevant part says: "One store has three different jars of low fat milk. One says '1 percent fat' on the jar. The second says '99 percent fat free'. The third says 'LOW FAT' in big letters and '1%' in small letters. As you can see, all the milk has the same amount of fat." So the text explicitly states that all three jars have the same amount of fat, even though they are labeled differently and have different prices. The question is asking which statement is correct. The options are A, B, C, D. The passage says "all the milk has the same amount of fat," so option D is correct. The other options conflict with this.
